ddls:
CREATE TABLE "drug_distribution" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distribution record */,
  "buyer_state" TEXT /* State where the buyer is located */,
  "buyer_county" TEXT /* County within the state where the buyer is located */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the distribution */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the drug distributed */,
  "mme" REAL /* Morphine milligram equivalents (MME) of the drug distributed */,
  "distribution_type" TEXT /* Type of distribution (e.g., wholesale, retail) */,
  "distribution_status" TEXT /* Status of the distribution (e.g., completed, in progress, canceled) */,
  "distribution_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the distribution (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "distribution_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the distribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drug_distribution_buyer_county FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_county") REFERENCES counties ("county_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drug_distribution_buyer_state FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_state") REFERENCES states ("state_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* State code (e.g., CO for Colorado) */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "state_population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "state_area" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "state_capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "state_governor" TEXT /* Name of the current governor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the county is located */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "county_population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "county_area" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "county_seat" TEXT /* Seat of the county government */,
  "county_population_density" REAL /* Population density of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buyers" (
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each buyer */,
  "buyer_name" TEXT /* Name of the buyer */,
  "buyer_type" TEXT /* Type of the buyer (e.g., pharmacy, hospital) */,
  "buyer_address" TEXT /* Address of the buyer */,
  "buyer_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the buyer */,
  "buyer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the buyer */,
  "buyer_license_number" TEXT /* License number of the buyer (e.g., pharmacy license) */,
  "buyer_license_expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the buyer's license */,
  "buyer_contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "buyer_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  "buyer_contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the primary contact person */,
  "buyer_establishment_date" TEXT /* Date the buyer was established */,
  "buyer_last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drugs" (
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drug */,
  "drug_name" TEXT /* Name of the drug */,
  "drug_type" TEXT /* Type of the drug (e.g., opioid, sedative) */,
  "drug_strength" TEXT /* Strength of the drug */,
  "drug_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the drug */,
  "drug_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the drug */,
  "drug_form" TEXT /* Form of the drug (e.g., tablet, liquid) */,
  "drug_route_of_administration" TEXT /* Route of administration (e.g., oral, intravenous) */,
  "drug_schedule" TEXT /* Schedule of the drug (e.g., Schedule II, Schedule III) */,
  "drug_indications" TEXT /* Indications for use of the drug */,
  "drug_contraindications" TEXT /* Contraindications for use of the drug */,
  "drug_side_effects" TEXT /* Common side effects of the drug */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distributors" (
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distributor */,
  "distributor_name" TEXT /* Name of the distributor */,
  "distributor_address" TEXT /* Address of the distributor */,
  "distributor_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the distributor */,
  "distributor_email" TEXT /* Email address of the distributor */,
  "distributor_license_number" TEXT /* License number of the distributor */,
  "distributor_license_expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the distributor's license */,
  "distributor_contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "distributor_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  "distributor_contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the primary contact person */,
  "distributor_establishment_date" TEXT /* Date the distributor was established */,
  "distributor_last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distribution_details" (
  "distribution_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distribution detail */,
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the distribution record */,
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the drug being distributed */,
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the distributor supplying the drug */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the buyer receiving the drug */,
  "distribution_date" TEXT /* Date of the distribution */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the drug distributed */,
  "mme" REAL /* Morphine milligram equivalents (MME) of the drug distributed */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number of the drug */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the drug */,
  "distribution_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the distribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_distribution_details_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_distribution_details_distribution_id FOREIGN KEY ("distribution_id") REFERENCES drug_distribution ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_distribution_details_drug_id FOREIGN KEY ("drug_id") REFERENCES drugs ("drug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_distribution_details_distributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("distributor_id") REFERENCES distributors ("distributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, auditor, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_position" TEXT /* Position or job title of the user */,
  "user_hire_date" TEXT /* Date the user was hired */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "user_password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the distribution record being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the system */,
  "access_browser" TEXT /* Browser used to access the system */,
  "access_duration" REAL /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_distribution_id FOREIGN KEY ("distribution_id") REFERENCES drug_distribution ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the report was last modified */,
  "report_last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "report_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_report_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_report_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("report_last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of the action (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Details of the action performed */,
  "action_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "action_device" TEXT /* Device used to perform the action */,
  "action_browser" TEXT /* Browser used to perform the action */,
  "action_duration" REAL /* Duration of the action session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_logs" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance check */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the check */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date when the compliance check was performed */,
  "check_type" TEXT /* Type of the compliance check (e.g., data accuracy, data security) */,
  "check_result" TEXT /* Result of the compliance check (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken based on the compliance check */,
  "check_location" TEXT /* Location where the compliance check was performed */,
  "check_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the compliance check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notification_logs" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., alert, report update) */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read, archived) */,
  "notification_delivery_method" TEXT /* Method of notification delivery (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notification_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
